value.title: Nginx Alias Traversal Misconfiguration
value.summary: Look for location/alias path traversal style weaknesses and leaked static roots.
value.snippet: Fingerprint static file roots, test normalized and encoded traversal payloads safely.

value.title: Apache HTTPD Misconfiguration Patterns
value.summary: Apache may expose directory indexing, verbose error pages, or risky alias/proxy routes.
value.snippet: Prioritize passive config checks and safe endpoint discovery before exploit verification templates.
